intro-description: Full Stack Web Developer with a strong commitment to my work, achieving high quality projects, to the expectations of my client.
job-one-description: Worked with the Scrum methodology, fixed bugs in Scorecloud, developed features such as reports, dashboards and chatbots for various platforms, implemented download queue encolamiento with Celery and Redis, and created and updated queries in Postgresql.
job-two-description: Developed Edukar's website with Django and Vue 3 (edukar.com), performed maintenance and updates of the website, and deployed the website using a Linux server.
job-three-description: Performed data cleaning, processing and analysis of AirPak data using Python. Conducted a prediction model of the next product purchase from AirPak/CashPak, set up an EC2 (AWS) instance for model training and results retrieval, and participated in company presentations on progress.
job-four-description: Performed correction and maintenance of the Notebooks used during the course, provided support in collecting theoretical material, taught the students the Python introduction and the use of the Pandas library, and led the study group of the students enrolled in the course.
